title: Database corruption when running low on inode
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, age SMALLINT CHECK (age >= 0), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (1, 'Alice', 30);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table (id, name, age) VALUES (2, NULL, 25);
SELECT id, name, age FROM test_schema.test_table WHERE age IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Database corruption when running low on inode
